extra.reason: Public dlg0/ai-me repository created; noreply identity and conservative public license set; lockfile normalized; npm ci/check/demo:dry pass; Beads graph and refs/dolt/data pushed; GitHub Actions passed.
ADR 0005 accepted and project/agent documentation now routes Milestone 1 through the policy-safe local SVG path.
Local SVG rig contract, first-party profile, bounded mapping, and compatibility validation are implemented and verified.
Deterministic abstract render-script compiler, JSONL CLI, lifecycle/conflict semantics, tests, and documentation are implemented and verified.
Self-contained offline SVG player generation and the required functional local-browser test are implemented, documented, and verified.
Restrained local SVG vocabulary implemented, covered, and manually reviewed in Chrome at 320px; VTube-independent path remains intact.
Durable completed/cancelled/error/failed/incomplete local SVG run bundles, logs, checksums, tests, and cancelled-player verification are complete.

Completed the policy-safe local SVG review/replay loop. Replay A (20260715T001338.814Z-79518f1791c2) and final Replay B (20260715T003121.821Z-d97aaab3251d) retain byte-identical plan and render-script inputs (plan SHA bff27295694c1a212c25573bde0dba61166835f63d1b082f37ebdb59ebc2854a; script SHA b2e8e1673a8b0043c375b2d1828b48eed22d7a069ea2871d16b0e847589c2eed). Rig/renderer-only revisions improved 320px legibility and responsive controls. Full-size and 320px Chrome playback passed countdown, pause/restart, completion, persistent disclosure, zero external resource requests, and exact neutral reset. Both durable bundles have checksummed manifests and completed review notes; optional recording fields remain null. npm run check, demo:dry, demo:mapping, demo:render-script, and demo:player pass. VTube remains explicitly untested/deferred because organizational IT blocks installation.

Milestone 1 local SVG epic acceptance is complete: validated semantic plan, versioned local rig, deterministic renderer-neutral script, self-contained file:// player, restrained 320px-reviewed vocabulary, durable checksummed run artifacts, comparable reviewed replays, persistent AI-delegate disclosure, and exact neutral reset. All repository checks and required local demos pass. Force-close is limited to the epic because its six remaining children are already frozen as a deferred optional VTube adapter: organizational IT blocks installation, so they are intentionally not claimed complete and are outside the policy-safe local SVG milestone scope.

Milestone 1 is complete with all 14 child issues closed. Eight policy-safe local SVG/baseline issues were implemented and verified. Six VTube model/client/session/preflight/hotkey/parameter issues were closed as superseded—not implemented—because the completed local SVG profile, renderer-neutral runtime, self-contained player, durable artifacts, and comparable review provide the approved alternative. No VTube evidence is claimed, and any future external renderer requires a fresh decision and newly scoped issues.
